Hero.title: Curated essentials for modern living
Hero.description: Discover our thoughtfully designed collection of premium products, crafted with care and built to last.

About.title: Our Story
About.paragraph1: We believe in the power of thoughtful design. Every product in our collection is carefully selected to bring quality, beauty, and functionality into your everyday life.
About.paragraph2: Our commitment to craftsmanship means we partner with makers who share our values — those who prioritize sustainable materials, ethical production, and timeless design over fleeting trends.

Newsletter.title: Stay in the loop
Newsletter.description: Be the first to know about new arrivals, exclusive offers, and stories from behind the scenes.
Newsletter.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
Newsletter.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
